---
title: "Onion Skin View Widget"
---

## Overview

Developer documentation for `OnionSkinViewWidget`, which displays onion skin views of data as overlaid temporal snapshots with spatial axes.

## Source Location

`src/WhiskerToolbox/Plots/OnionSkinViewWidget/`

## Architecture

*TODO: Document widget architecture, state management, and key classes.*

## Key Classes

- `OnionSkinViewWidget` — Main widget class

## See Also

- [Plot Widget Guide](../plot_widget_guide.md)
